name: irfanabduhu
description: Book club presentation and reading guide generator

plugins.name: book-club
plugins.description: Create book club presentations and reading guides from epub/PDF/text files. Produces elegant HTML slide presentations with book-page aesthetic and comprehensive markdown reading guides.

plugins.name: book-study
plugins.description: Comprehensive multi-book study that traces intellectual evolution across an author's body of work. Analyzes multiple books together, identifies how ideas develop and transform, suggests reading order, and produces a unified HTML slide presentation with cross-book analysis.
